items.reason: This is an offline coverage/reference audit over curated shared source files. Direct file reads are acceptable as audit inputs and do not affect runtime scope isolation.
items.recommended_action: Keep as script-internal; if converted to runtime lookup, require load_terms(scope=...).

items.reason: This inventory must inspect raw shared-core and Meta mirror files directly; using scope loader would hide the file-layer pollution being audited.
items.recommended_action: Keep direct reads for inventory/reporting only.
